creator: bsdcode@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 256291
v2

I updated the patch and applied your suggestion to exclude the unbundled dependencies from extraction. I also removed the ZSTD related patch for when PR 283707 is fixed.

For now I kept the full git hash for GH_TAGNAME (but used the short hashes for the Commitlog in the patch description, I think it's ok there) and the CMAKE_ARGS.
